headline: Which dow jones stocks are moving on Thursday?
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the dow jones index one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: 100+ Marvel employees now have just 1 year to uproot their lives and move across the country
summary: Marvel Comics is leaving its New York home of nearly 90 years for Burbank, home to Disney and Marvel Studios.

headline: The Real Engine Driving Netflix Stock Is Its Earnings Power
summary: With the stock out of favor, investors are focused on slowing sales growth, but they may be missing the more powerful story of how efficiently Netflix is compounding profit per share.

raw.headline: The Real Engine Driving Netflix Stock Is Its Earnings Power
raw.summary: With the stock out of favor, investors are focused on slowing sales growth, but they may be missing the more powerful story of how efficiently Netflix is compounding profit per share.

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Disney’s cruise ship fleet generated $3 billion in the last fiscal year—and the company plans to add 5 more in a $60 billion expansion
summary: The company has historically declined to break out financials for its ships—but the numbers can be found via a mysteriously named shell company that does not use the “Disney” name.

headline: Netflix Worries Binge-Watching Era Is Over
summary: With its share price down some 20% so far this year and off more than 40% from a peak last summer, Netflix is hoping for a turnaround story.

raw.headline: Netflix Worries Binge-Watching Era Is Over
